flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Tarrant County College District rose 31% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.0k → $2.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tarrant County College District rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (35.1k → 42.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tarrant County College District rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 (6.9% → 7.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Tarrant County College District rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (61.6% → 70.1%).
